prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 2.6L *Tipo 00560* V8 (9.0:1 CR, 200 HP) with a fully forged *Tipo 00560* stroker kit (3.0L, 10.5:1 CR) using Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83.5mm bore), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a custom Schrick 284° camshaft grind (0.480" lift) and titanium retainers from Supertech Performance.

Forced Induction: Install a Rotrex C38-91 centrifugal supercharger (12 psi peak) with a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR Racing) and a custom intake manifold (fabricated by Alfaholics) to accommodate the supercharger’s unique flow characteristics. Use a custom ECU tune via a MoTeC M150 standalone system with individual cylinder fuel trims and knock control.

Drivetrain: Replace the stock ZF 5-speed with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) and a Tilton twin-disc clutch (7.25" diameter) with a billet flywheel. Upgrade the half-shafts to custom CV joints from GKN Driveline with reinforced boots and a 30% torque capacity increase.
estetica: Body: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit from Zender (originally designed for the Montreal but discontinued; sourced from a private collector) with integrated front splitter and rear diffuser. Replace the stock bumpers with lightweight polyurethane replicas from Autocult (Germany) for a 1970s Group 4 rally aesthetic.

Wheels: Fit 16x9" and 16x11" OZ Racing Superleggera GT wheels (originally used on the Lancia Stratos) with custom offsets (+15mm front, +25mm rear) and Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (225/50R16 front, 265/45R16 rear). Use custom center-lock adapters from BBS Motorsport for quick swaps.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro SRD-E full carbon fiber shells (originally designed for the Montreal’s narrow cabin) and Schroth 6-point harnesses. Install a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (UK) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360) and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub.
